title: ⚡️ SuperiorSkyblock2 ⚡️ zMenu Addon
description: Optimized, features packed skyblock core. With zMenu !
body:
[![MineStrator Code](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/715b4a8ffa9ed90dacb64c4847174bf651889809_0.webp)](https://minestrator.com/a/GROUPEZ)
### SuperiorSkyblock2 with zMenu Integration

This addon from SuperiorSkyBlock allows you to use zMenu for inventory management!
This is not a plugin but an addon of SuperiorSkyBlock!

#### Why zMenu?

- **Customizability**: zMenu allows for flexible, highly customizable inventories.
- **Performance**: Optimized for performance, zMenu provides a smooth experience even on large servers.
- **User-Friendly**: Its intuitive interface ensures a straightforward experience for both admins and players.
- **Compatibility**: Easily integrates with other plugins, making it ideal for managing a wide range of inventories.

#### Developers Welcome!

If you're a developer, we encourage you to contribute to this fork. Your help can make this integration even better!

Stay tuned for updates as development progresses!

---

💬 **Join our Discord for support and discussions**: [https://discord.groupez.dev/](https://discord.groupez.dev/)

📖 **Check out the zMenu documentation**: [https://docs.zmenu.dev/](https://docs.zmenu.dev/)

🛠️ **Try the zMenu Online Inventory Editor**: [https://minecraft-inventory-builder.com/](https://minecraft-inventory-builder.com/)

✅ **Documentation**: [https://superiorskyblock.groupez.dev/](https://superiorskyblock.groupez.dev/)
